title: coelogyne cordata
intro: Coelogyne cordata is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and China, also known as the flat-leaved coelogyne or Himalayan coelogyne. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne cordata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
